tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Deep jerkbait is a search lure for big-water smallmouth on huge flats. Use MEGA 360 to find bottom composition changes, then direct high-percentage casts. Forward-facing sonar gives real-time feedback — adjust cadence, color, or running depth until you trigger fish. Switch to dropshot when bass follow but won't commit.'

knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Great Lakes smallmouth forage varies — yellow perch, crawfish, round gobies. Perch favor grass/sand patches; gobies live in rock. Minnow-imitating lures (jerkbaits, crankbaits) excel on perch bites. Goby-imitating swimbaits and jig combos for goby bites. Identify target forage first — it can change seasonally and day-to-day.'

KVD: 'Deep jerkbait for smallmouth: slower-action medium-heavy rod (not snappy like standard jerkbait rod), fast reel, 12-14lb fluorocarbon. The slower rod action works better for the deep-diving versions.'
